summary: Tested hierarchical Plano de Contas feature with dependent dropdowns. The bug fix (e.stopPropagation() on line 202) is CONFIRMED WORKING - clicking + button on any account correctly opens modal with the right parent pre-selected. All features tested are working correctly.

issues: Intermittent 'Erro ao carregar plano de contas' / 'Erro ao carregar contas' toast appears on page load, but data still loads correctly - may be a race condition or duplicate API call

Contas a Receber: Plano de Contas dropdown shows only Level 1 Receita accounts (2.0 - TEST_Receitas de Serviços) - SUCCESS
